memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t mt, uint8_t group, uint8_t status, uint8_t d1, uint8_t d2) noexcept
memberdef.name: UMP32

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t mt, uint8_t group, uint8_t status, uint8_t d1, uint8_t d2=0) noexcept
memberdef.name: create

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t channel, uint8_t note, uint8_t velocity, uint8_t group=0) noexcept
memberdef.name: note_on

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t channel, uint8_t note, uint8_t velocity=0, uint8_t group=0) noexcept
memberdef.name: note_off

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t channel, uint8_t cc_num, uint8_t value, uint8_t group=0) noexcept
memberdef.name: cc

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t channel, uint8_t program, uint8_t group=0) noexcept
memberdef.name: program_change

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t channel, uint16_t value, uint8_t group=0) noexcept
memberdef.name: pitch_bend

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t channel, uint8_t pressure, uint8_t group=0) noexcept
memberdef.name: channel_pressure

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t channel, uint8_t note, uint8_t pressure, uint8_t group=0) noexcept
memberdef.name: poly_pressure

detaileddescription.para: Stores as single uint32_t for efficient comparison and manipulation. Layout: [MT:4][Group:4][Status:8][Data1:8][Data2:8]
